text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Doubling as preparation for regional races, our
senior-year summer camp officially begins.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru vows to do everything she
can during the grueling summer training to show
just how far she's come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on making her own luck through diligent
effort, she leaps into action under the bright
summer sky.
